message:
feat(server): wire XREAD BLOCK and XREADGROUP BLOCK to blocking infrastructure

- Add BXread and BXreadgroup variants to BlockingOp enum
- Parse BLOCK keyword in XREAD/XREADGROUP commands via
  parse_xread_block_deadline() helper in try_build_blocked_state()
- Fulfill blocked XREAD/XREADGROUP by re-executing the full command
  and checking if data is now available
- Add write_tokens parameter to check_blocked_clients and fix
  process_buffered_frames call site signature mismatches
- Blocked XREAD/XREADGROUP returns Array(None) on timeout (matching Redis)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
